"'''Pathways'''" is a [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] story in ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 8]]'' about a lost [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]].

==Plot summary==
Marching on a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] stronghold on the planet [[Antamont]],<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|I|33|Antamont}}</ref> a [[lone battle droid]] steps on a mine, blowing the line apart. Shockingly, that battle droid survives, his connection to the hive-mind severed. Realizing that he has a life of potential ahead of him, the droid flees, only to be spotted by a [[Grapple droid (Antamont)|single]] [[B2 grapple droid/Legends|grapple droid]], who pursues him only to be knocked off a cliff, the battle droid falling shortly behind. The Grapple droid, beginning to shut down, is afraid of death, but the battle droid comforts him and stays with him until he "dies". Walking away from his crushed former-companion, the battle droid finds a secluded tree, where he sits down, his power source already depleted. He remains there for some years, only to be found later by a group of [[Farm/Legends|farmers]], who decide to power him up and use him on the farm.
